content.en:
Revenge must be taken!

The other bone transformation realms were also full of anger, after all, even the territorial sea boundary crack dared to come to the Yahe boundary crack to make trouble, and it also caused losses to them.

The key point is that they haven't killed the two Heavenly Ancestors in the Territorial Sea Boundary Sea, and they haven't even found the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Genius.

What a shame!

Now, many Blood Transformation Realms in the entire Yahe Realm are secretly discussing Yahe Palace, thinking that Yahe Palace's strength is not good, and that's it, thus bringing them a loss of reputation.

So, this field must be recovered.

Subsequently, they united the front and had to take revenge.

"How many bone transformation realms have been sent?"

The Lord of True Eyes asked.

Huang Ze only proposed: "I, the Lord of the True Pupil, and the Great Elder have all gone over, and then selected thirteen bone transformation realms, and the number does not need to be too much." After all, we can't destroy the territorial sea rift, and the goal is only to retaliate against the territorial sea rift. "

"Agreed!"

Other bone metamorphoses are nodded one by one.

......

Yahe Palace looks like it's going to deal with the territorial sea boundary crack!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He knew that he had to do something, otherwise if he really let the bone transformation realm of Yahe Palace enter the crack of the territorial waters, maybe it would affect the Terrans, such as passing by the Terran territory by the way, waving his hand, and the Terrans would be gone.

Therefore, he must stop it.

Swish!

Ye Tian's Gu Lou Heavenly Ancestor quickly came to the entrance of the passage to the boundary rift of the territorial waters.

After he knew that this entrance was here, he chose to leave, and did not come closer.

Somewhere in the seam of the river boundary.

Ye Tian copied another copy body, and it was also a nine-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius who was a little against him in Yahe Palace, the Phoenix Cluster Heavenly Ancestor.

Soon, the copy body of the Phoenix Cluster Heavenly Ancestor was copied.

Then, he approached the entrance of the passage with the body of the Phoenix Cluster Heavenly Ancestor.

"Lord Feng Tuan, it says that you are not allowed to enter. "

When the blood transformation realm saw that Ye Tian was about to enter the passage, they stopped it.

Ye Tian said coldly: "I went over to see the situation, and then came back, if there is any problem, I will be responsible." "

Then, he didn't listen to the advice and went straight through, and it was too late to stop the other Blood Transformation Realms.

......

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

Ye Tian came here through the entrance as the Phoenix Cluster Heavenly Ancestor.

"So the entrance is here!"

He memorized the location, then returned to the Yahe Boundary Rift, and then left the place directly.

After that, he annihilated the replica body.

The Heavenly Ancestors of the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift could not perceive the entrance of the Yahe Boundary Rift to the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift, but at this moment, after Ye Tian knew the information, he immediately reported this information to the Lord of Darkness.

Dark Sea.

"Endless Heavenly Ancestor, are you sure that the entrance to the Territorial Sea Boundary Rift appears at that location?" The Lord of Darkness was a little unconvinced, he couldn't even perceive it, how could Ye Tian sense it.

Ye Tian explained: "Lord of Darkness, I need to lie, besides, it won't do me any good. You might as well believe it once, if they really invade from there, I don't know if you can make a little preparation, otherwise when the Bone Transformation Realm creatures of Yahe Palace arrive, it will be troublesome!"

"Okay, I believe you, I'll contact the other Bone Transformation Realms, but if your information is not accurate, you'll be in trouble afterwards!" reminded the Lord of Darkness.

"I know!"

Ye Tiandao.

......

Somewhere in the boundary of the territorial waters.

The Lord of Darkness, the Lord of the Ancient Mountain, and all the other bone transformation realms have come.

The Lord of the Cave Void also came, after all, there was no Lord of the Cave Void to make a move in this matter, and they couldn't help those bone transformation realms in the Yahe Palace.

"Let's set up!"

The Lord of the Void said.

Whew!!!

One of the bone-changing realms began to set up.

For the Bone Transformation Realm, using the formation can still burst out with more terrifying power, but the formation they need to arrange is very advanced, and the cost is also very large.

If it weren't for the guarantee of the Lord of Darkness, and the consent of the Lord of the Void, otherwise the other Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors would definitely not easily agree to set up the formation.

In case Ye Tian said something wrong, then their loss would not be small!

Soon, the formation was arranged, and then it was continuously reinforced.

And a Bone Transformation Realm stood on top of the node, urging the magic circle all the time, absorbing the endless energy of the territorial sea boundary gap, so as to keep this magic circle at the peak of its power.

Once those Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors from Yahe Palace came in, they immediately launched an all-out blow and sacrificed this magic circle, thus seriously injuring and even killing several Bone Transformation Realms.

Under normal circumstances, this formation was useless, because it was impossible for other bone transformation realms to come in obediently.

But if Ye Tian's information is correct, then he can hit Yahe Palace hard.

Time passed slowly, and they were also a little anxious, not knowing if they had made a mistake this time.

Finally.

Time and space twisted, and one figure after another appeared, and it was a bone transformation realm of Yahe Palace.

They're really coming!

"Attack!"

The main path of the void.

Rumble!!!!!

This circle burned all the origins, and under the control of a bone transformation, it exploded with a lethality beyond the limit.

This area has been annihilated hundreds of millions of times.

And the one in Yahe Palace was stunned, why did he fall into such a big formation as soon as he came in, and he was attacked!

A weaker bone transformation realm was directly bombarded and killed, and there was not even a scum left.

The Lord of the True Pupil, the Lord of the Emperor Ze, these powerful Bone Transformation Realm struck with all their might, trying to block this blow.

However, they hurriedly resisted and were injured one by one.

"Get out!"

The Lord of True Pupils ordered.

Whew!!!

This bone-changing realm withdrew from the Yahe Boundary Rift.

......

The seam of the river boundary.

One of the Bone Transformation Realms has returned, and the Lord of True Pupils and several other Bone Transformation Realms have withstood most of the attacks, and they are seriously injured at the moment.

The other bone transformation realms were also extremely miserable, and some of them had a little remnant left, and they slowly healed into a complete body.

In short, none of the bone transformation realms that came back alive were complete.

"What's wrong with these Bone Transformation Realm Adults?"

Those blood transformation realms in Yahe Palace were confused, how could they become like this after entering and coming back, what a terrifying attack this is!

Could it be that the territorial sea boundary has given birth to an incomparably terrifying powerhouse during these years, which has hit these big people in Yahe Palace hard?

"Fallen Six Bone Transformation Realm !!!"

The Lord of the True Pupil was extremely distressed.

Moreover, they have been hit hard one by one now, and it will take a long time to recover!

The point is, they don't understand why it's like this.

"There is definitely a traitor!" "The Lord of Huang Ze said angrily: "It is estimated that those bone transformation realms in the seams of the territorial sea are gathered there, and there is more than a magic circle, and the full force of this magic circle is attacked, and it doesn't even need to be charged, it is directly an attack." Explanation, they knew we were coming, and they were ready for a long time. "

"Who has entered this rift entrance during this time?"

The Lord of True Eyes asked.

At this time, a Blood Transformation Realm trembled and said, "Lord Feng Tuan has been in, but he will be back soon!"

"Phoenix Cluster !!!"

The Lord of Huangze was angry, he thought that it was the bone transformation realm between Feng Tuan and the territorial sea boundary that reported the situation, or was found traces, but did not report.

In short, whatever the case may be, Feng Tuan is damned!
